As soon as you enter the game you’ll see this function where you can store Items. The Backpack is split to 6 sections:
*Items: In this tab, you can see the General Items, Treasure Chests and other things
*Equipment: In this tab, you can see all the Equipments
*Material: In this tab, you can see the Equipment forging material
*Spirit Stones: In this tab, you can see the Spirit Stones
*Hōgu: After you get a Hōgu, it will be stored in this tab
*Temporary Bag: After your backpack is full, all the items you own will go into this tab.If you don’t move the Items in this tab to other tabs within set amount of time, it will disappear!

You can complete Level 29 Main Task to activate this Function. In this function, you can operate on Hōgu.
*In the interface, click on the tabs on top to change between functions.
*Equip Hōgu : Click on the Hōgu in Item Tab to equip, click on any of the equipped Hōgu to remove.
*Hōgu Upgrade : Left click any one Hōgu, will consume the same Hōgu to Upgrade , you can also use Gold to upgrade directly , after Upgrading, will greatly increase this Hōgu’s Attributes.
*Hōgu Convert: Left click to select one Hōgu, will consume Hōgu Convert Talisman to convert to one of the 3 different types of Hōgu of the same quality.
*Hōgu has no Level requirements, but high quality Hōgu cannot be equipped on low quality Partners . For example, Gold Hōgu cannot be equipped on Purple Partners.
*（Note: Equipped and Upgraded Hōgu cannot convert or upgrade quality< /B>）

When your level reaches 24, Arena will be activated, player can challenge each other here. Every day, in accordance to player’s Arena’s Ranking, send out corresponding reward.
*Daily Challenge ChancesMaximum is 100 chances
*Each time you challenge someone, no matter win or lose, there will be 5 minutes of challenge CD Time , until CD Time is over, then can challenge again. .
*CD Time can be cleared using Gold.
*Player can challenge players who are within 10 places higher than self. In accordance to players ranking in Arena, the 10 possible challengers’ gaps are different.When player is within #1 – 100, the gap is 1 between the 10 challengers; when player is within # 101 – 200, the gap between the 10 players is 2; when player is lower than 200th place, the gap is 3.
*Player A and Player B challenge each other in Arena. A’s rank is lower than B.After A defeats B, A’s current ranking will become B’s previous ranking, B’s current ranking will move back 1. All players ranked between A and B will also move back one.
*Arena reward: single challenge, no matter win or lose, after challenge ends will obtain Prestige and Silver reward, challenge winning reward will be more than challenge failed reward.
* Every day evening at 7:30 PM’s Arena Ranking as basis, will send out the Arena Ranking Treasure Chest reward the next day.

After you completed Level 30 Main Task, will activate Trial.
*Trial is split up according to Level to different phases, each Phase has 5 stages. Player needs to challenge pass the previous stage , then can challenge the next stage.
*After defeating the Partners in the stages, you can get Hōgu.
*Hōgu can be equipped within the Hōgu Interface, therefore increasing Partners’ Attributes. Hōgu’s Type are split to: Strength, Agility, Wisdom, HP.
*Hōgu does not have level requirements, but high quality Hōgu cannot be equipped on low quality Partners , for example Gold Hōgu cannot be equipped on Purple Partners.

*Conversation: talk with NPC then can submit task.

Click on NPC and click on Tavern to enter the Tavern. Within the Tavern are many famous partners within Bleach waiting for you to recruit.

Spirit Stones are used to increase Partners Battle Power, if you embed the Spirit Stones on the Equipment , you will discover it can increase Partners’ Strength, Agility, Wisdom, HP and other Attributes, therefore greatly increasing your partners battle capability
*Players who have activated Spirit Stones Styem can find Main City’s Nemu Kurotsuchi to enter Spirit Stones Interface, select the equipment that you want to embed Spirit Stones, then click on the Spirit Stones and can be embedded successfully. After embedding successfully, if this equipment has empty holes then can continue to embed.The same type of Spirit Stones cannot be embed within the same Equipment. If players don’t want to use the original Spirit Stones, you can select the equipment, then click on the Spirit Stone you wan to remove to remove it.
*2 low level Spirit Stones can be synthesized to a higher level Spirit Stones, Spirit Stones embed is not limited to any particular equipment, System will recommend which type of Spirit Stones is suitable for which Partners.Blue Equipment can embed 4 Spirit Stones, Purple Equipment can embed 6 Spirit Stones, butthe same equipment cannot be embedded with the same Attribute’s Spirit Stones.

Guild War:
1. Guild War last 30 minutes.
2. Click on the circle to select birthplace, and enter into the row according to click order
3. After you enter into one row, you can select to join another row, withCD Time .
4. Continuous wins against more people, then the Points obtained will also be higher.
5. If you defeat a rival who has more than 5 winning streaks , you can get bonus points, defeated playerswill not lose points.
6, Within the event period, Personal and guild rank will be based on the points.
7. After winning Battle you keep the remaining HP to continue challenge other.
8. After losing battle, the HP will be refilled, after clearing Death CD, you can select birthplace and challenge again.
9. Spend Gold to clear CD.
10. Guild War Level will affect your Attributes.
11. You can spend Gold to inspire own attributes
12. According to Personal Points Ranking to give out to each individual participants one reward.
13. According to Personal Points and Belonging Guild to get Guild Ranking, at first, The top 10 guild can get rewards and can join the next day Protect Seireitei Battle; starting 2nd day will select, except for Protect Seireitei Defender , Warthe rank top 9 guild can attend Protect Seireitei.

Protect Seireitei:
1. Protect Seireitei last 30 minutes.
2. Within the event period, if the attacker breaks two city walls, the attacker wins, otherwise the defender wins.
3. Attackerclick on the Gate, canattack the Defenders within the list, and also will be attacked by Defender. If the list does not have Defender, then can attack the Gate.
4. After Defender click on the Gate, can attack the attackers in the list, and will also be attacked by the Attacker.
5, After the Attacker fail to kill the Defender, Defenders will receive damage once, Defender continue to defend the Gate for longer periods, then will receive higher damage.
6. While Defender is defending the outer Gate, will gain 100% HP Bonus ; while defending Inner Gate, will gain 130% HP Bonus .
7. The Protect Seireitei Level within Guild will affect your Attributes Bonus .

Evil Spirit Attacks
1. Two daily rounds: 12:59 - 13:30 and 17:59 - 18:30.
2. You may join only one round per day.
3. Each Clan attacks its own Evil Spirit first.
4. If your Clan kills its Evil Spirit, you may attack the other two Clans.
5. Evil Spirit level rises with the average server level.
6. Top 10 damage players receive ranking rewards.
7. The player who lands the killing blow receives an extra reward.
8. Shinigami Agent users auto-enter while online when the event starts.
9. You can spend Gold to Inspire or Revive.

Ryoka Attack
1. Ryoka Attack lasts 30 minutes.
2. Defeat as many Ryoka as possible during the event.
3. Higher damage means better rewards.
4. The player who kills a Ryoka gains extra rewards.
5. Each wave contains 5 Ryoka with a 10 second gap.
6. The Top 30 receive ranking rewards by mail.
7. Clan Point rewards are also sent by mail after the event.
8. Damage milestones grant attack bonuses to all participants.
9. Shinigami Agent users auto-enter while online when the event starts.

1.Unlocks at lv.25.
2.You can transform into a ninja from Ninja Club,
3. Each transformation costs one tranform chance.
4.Transformation lasts 30 mins.
5.You can get one free transform everyday

Soul Hunt
1. This Function will be activated when player level reaches Level 31.
2.Every day, each player has 5 chances for hunting and 4 chances of being robbed.
3. During each hunt, player has 5 chances of Silver Refresh and 10 chances of Gold Refresh, use these chances to get higher quality hunting target and start hunting. VIP 6 and above players spend set amount of Gold can directly open Espada Soul Hunt.
Each hunting, you might be robbed at most twice.
5.According to Soul Hunt quality, you’ll get different final reward. Each Soul Hunt has complete list of possible items, and each time you have a chance of getting one of the reward.
6.Soul Hunt is the main source for Cultivate Zanpakutō material.

Ninja Club
1. This feature unlocks at Lv.20.
2. Players can recruit the powerful ninjas in the Ninja Club.
3.Recruiting or upgrading ninjas need some materials and Ninja Souls. Materials are mainly from the treasure hunt in the treasure map and Ninja Souls from Janken in Tavern.
4.Daily quest may get you Hokage Proof, which is the common material in Ninja Club. 1 Hokage Proof can replace the material that is required to recruit or upgrade 1 ninja in Ninja Club.
5. The level of Ninja equals the Recruit Level . Level after upgrade equals the Upgrade level.

6. If you dismiss a ninja from the Ninja Club (after recruitment or upgrade), you won’t get back the materials you spend on recruitment or upgrade.

Shop
1.This feature unlocks at Lv.10.
2. Players can buy various items which could boost power in the Mall
3.Players can view items on the Hot Sale Page.
4. If you are VIP6 or higher, you can buy all items except those on the Hot Sale Page with 15% off.

Daily Quest
1. This feature unlocks at Lv.32.
2. Players can claim and finish quests to obtain quest points and rewards
3.Use button Refresh can refresh quest list. Players have 1 free refresh chance every day.
4. Players could get the quest of 2X reward through refreshing. Finish the quest and the point reward hasn't been claimed double until the points reach the requirement . so it's recommendable to complete 2X reward quest before claiming the reward.
5. Some quests will be displayed in the target quests. When players finish the target quests, they will get extra point bonus . There is no limit on the quality of the target quest, i.e., finishing a target quest of any quality is deemed as completion of target quest and acquisition of point bonus.

Daily Event
1. This feature unlocks at Lv.33.
2.This panel display the events and event details every day.

Master/Slave Contract
1. The feature unlocks at Lv. 24
2. If you are a free man, you have 8 captures, 3 rescues, and 6 interactions every day . Players can rescue the guild members who are slaves but if you are captured by other players, you turn to others’ slave.
3. If you are a master, you have 10 captures, 3 rescues and 6 interactions every day . EXP got from slaves increase with your level.
4.If you are a slave, you have 3 rescues, 3 resists, and 6 interactions every day. If you are a slave, you cannot rescue others or capture slaves.
5. Slaves can produce EXP every minute for masters and work up to 24 hours. After 24 hours, EXP will automatically be calculated and given to the masters. Slaves gain freedom
6. When you win the battle in slave capture, you will enslave one of the losing player’s slaves if he/she is a slave owner.

;

Jigokuchō
1. This Function will be available when player reaches Level 18.
2. In accordance to Player’s VIP Level, every day player has set amount of summoning chances to exchange for Silver.
3.Higher Level means you get more silver per summoning.

Guild
1. This feature unlocks at Lv.26.
2.Players can create or join a guild and adventure with guild members after joining a clan and the guild is unlocked.
3. Guild members can donate Silver or Gold every day. The daily silver donation quota goes higher with the guild member level.
4.Donation can upgrade guilds. Once the guild is upgraded, the guild’s skill level can increase as well. Guild members can spend some Feats to raise their own skill levels. Guild Skill becomes ineffective when a guild member exits the guild and is effective again after joining next guild.
5. Guild leader can transfer his/her authorization or appoint vice guild leader. For details, please view authorization. If the guild leader fails to login for 3 days. the guild leader’s authorization will be transferred to the guild member with the highest Feats.
6. Guild Donation can also be used to upgrade events and boost guild members’ statuses
7. Guilds can get Guild Chests that will be stored in the guild warehouse based on the war result when attending daily events. The Guild Chest will be assigned to guild members by guild leader.
8.If all members in the guild not log in for 3 days, the guild will be dismissed.

King of Hollow Souls Function Introduction
1. This Function is available at Level 70.
2. Player can challenge the Hollow King and subordinates to get Hollow Spirit, different Hollow King corresponds to different Hollow Spirit.
3. Challenge process includes individual challenges and team challenges. Player select one of the Partners to single challenge enemies; after winning or losing, will enter into group challenge.Single challenge win or lose will affect the group challenge’s initial Fury value.
4. After you win the group fight, you’ll get the Hollow Spirit and able to challenge the next opponent. If you failed in the group fight, you have to start with the single challenge again.
5.After you defeat a Hollow King, then you can challenge the next Hollow King and subordinates.At the same time, Hollow Spirit Map will activate the corresponding Spirit Star..
6. After you group challenge win against a Hollow King, every day you can swallow the Hollow King to get corresponding Hollow Spirit.
7. Single challenges are immune from decrease Fury. Most of the opponents in group challenge are immune from decrease Fury; all shadows are immune from decrease Fury and at the same time immune from control..

Hollow Spirit Map Function Introduction
1. This function is available at Level 70.
2. Each recruited Partners has own Hollow Spirit Map.
3.You can consume corresponding Hollow Spirit points to activate Spirit Star and get corresponding Attributes Bonus .This Attributes are affective in all battlefields.
4. Through Spirit Star exchange function, can exchange the Hollow Spirit Map between two Partners, This exchange does not consume anything.
5. In King of Hollow Souls, each time you successfully defeat one Hollow King, all Partners will activate corresponding Spirit Star.
6.When you fire Partners, this Partners’ Hollow Spirit Map related Spirit Star consumed Hollow Spirit will bereturned fully.

Tsunade's Dice
There are 3 free chances to guess and for mistakes per day. The free chances will be reset at 24:00 everyday
Buy guess chances costs 10 Gold while mistake time costs 100 Gold a time.
When win streaks meet the requirement, players can claim the Win Streak Chest
Gameplay:
1. Players guess if their points are bigger than Tsunade’s and click Big or Small
2.Win Streak+1 and enter the next round of guess if players win
3. Players can use mistake times to keep the current win streaks and challenge Tsunade again after this guess time is deducted if they fail
4. If players give up this win streak, they have to claim the chests they already have before the next guess
5. Players shall claim all claimable chests when reaching 100 Win streaks to proceed with next challenge

Elite Match
1.Increase player’s ninja level to Lv. 72can join Elite Match.
2.Register during 5:30-24:00every day and you can join the Elite Match that is available at 12:00-22:00next day.
3. Vip8and higher players can automatically register for the Elite Match, but if you fail to start the challenge within 3 days, you will be disqualified.
4.In the Elite Match, defeat the opponent can get Points while losing the battle can also get you some points.
5.Every day, players can freely challenge 18 times.The challenge cap is 30 times.
6. Defeat all opponents in a group can get a Challenge Order.and is able to challenge next group.
7. Use super challenge feature can challenge advanced ninjas..Win it and you can get massive Points.
8. On the first day of the match（must register manually),players will be divided into 7 groups based on players’ PVP combat power: Top, Kage, ANBU, Jounin, Chunin, Genin and Student.
9. From the next onplayers will be ranked based on players’ elite match points.If players don’t sign up on the first day, the initial points will be 0.
10. The higher the group, the more challenge order can be obtained every day..ANBU or higher group can get Cross-Server War Title.
11. Elite Match lasts 1 month.Colorfull souls will be sent based on players’ point ranking every day .
12.After the season， Colorful Soul and Challenge Order will be sent according to the player's rank.
13.Top Stone redeemed from the Challenge Order can recruit SSSRare Ninja!Challenge Order and Top Stone can be redeemed after the season and be counted into the next season.

will be sent based on players’ point rank in the group at the end of each season. 4. Top Stone redeemed from the Challenge Order can be used to recruit SSS rare ninjas and rare equipment !
